info.title: Default module
info.description: REST API documentation for the Plantera plant care management and diagnostics system.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's profile avatar

id.description: Unique identifier of the plant species

commonName.description: Common name of the plant species

about.description: A brief overview or history of the plant
about.x-apidog-mock: Popular tropical climbing plant native to southern Mexico.

water.x-apidog-mock: Water thoroughly when the top 2-3 inches of soil is dry.

whereToGrow.x-apidog-mock: Indoor pots, greenhouse, or warm patio.

toxicity.x-apidog-mock: Toxic to cats and dogs due to calcium oxalate.

howToGrow.x-apidog-mock: Use well-draining soil mix and provide a moss pole for support.

imageUrl.description: URL to a high-resolution photo of the plant

wateringFrequency.description: Average number of days between waterings

fertilizingFrequency.description: Average number of days between fertilizing

Plant.description: Botanical description and care guidelines for a plant species cataloged in the encyclopedia.

image.description: URL to the diagnostic scan image

name.description: Primary name of the diagnosed disease

causes.description: Triggers or causes of the infection

symptoms.description: Visual symptoms observed on the foliage

description.description: Detailed summary of the disease behavior
description.x-apidog-mock: A common fungal disease coating plant leaves in white mycelium.

Disease.description: Detailed record of a plant disease, containing causes, symptoms, and treatment instructions.

id.description: Unique identifier of this garden plant entry

wateringFrequency.description: Custom watering frequency in days (overrides catalog default)

fertilizingFrequency.description: Custom fertilizing frequency in days (overrides catalog default)

createdAt.description: Date when the user added this plant to their collection

MyPlant.description: Represents a user's customized plant entry in their personal virtual garden.

NotificationPreferences.description: User preferences for push notifications, reminders, and emails.

example.message: User registered successfully, authentication and session refresh tokens returned.

RegisterRequest.description: Payload containing registration details for a new user account.

LoginRequest.description: Payload containing email and password credentials for logging in.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

data.description: Payload containing the generated session access and refresh tokens

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's profile avatar

LoginResponse.description: Success response containing user profile details and JWT authentication tokens.

ForgotPasswordRequest.description: Payload containing the email address to request a password reset OTP.

success.description: Indicates if the reset code was successfully sent

message.x-apidog-mock: Password reset code sent to your email address.
message.description: Feedback message for the user interface

ForgotPasswordResponse.description: Success response wrapper confirming the password reset OTP has been sent.

otp.description: The 6-digit one-time verification code received via email

VerifyOtpRequest.description: Payload containing the verification OTP and email to obtain a password reset token.

success.description: Indicates if the verification code is valid

message.const: OTP code verified successfully.
message.description: Success message for the user interface

resetToken.description: The temporary validation token received after successfully verifying the OTP.

VerifyOtpResponse.description: Success response wrapper containing the temp password reset token.

success.description: Indicates if the password was successfully reset

message.const: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now log in.
message.description: Success message for the user interface

ResetPasswordResponse.description: Success response wrapper confirming the password has been reset.

resetToken.description: The temporary verification token received after verifying the OTP.

ResetPasswordRequest.description: Payload containing the email, reset token, and new secure password.

AuthErrorCode.description: Categorized enum of authentication and authorization error codes.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

data.description: List of plants in the user's garden

MyPlantsListResponse.description: Paginated response containing the list of customized plant entries in the user's garden.

AddToMyPlantsRequest.description: Payload required to add a plant species from the encyclopedia to the user's garden.

success.description: Indicates if the plant was successfully added

message.x-apidog-mock: Plant added to your virtual garden successfully.

AddToMyPlantsResponse.description: Success response wrapper returned after adding a plant to the garden.

success.description: Indicates if the plant was successfully removed

message.x-apidog-mock: Plant removed from your virtual garden successfully.

RemoveFromMyPlantsResponse.description: Success response wrapper returned after removing a plant from the garden.

UpdateScheduleRequest.description: Payload to update the custom watering and fertilizing schedule of a garden plant.

success.description: Indicates if the care schedule was updated successfully

UpdateScheduleResponse.description: Success response wrapper returned after updating a plant's schedule.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

PlantListResponse.description: Paginated catalog list of botanical plant species.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

PlantResponse.description: Success response containing details of a single plant species.

PlantErrorCode.description: Categorized enum of botanical catalog operation error codes.

UpdateProfileRequest.description: Payload containing name and email to update a user's profile.

success.description: Indicates if the profile was successfully updated

UpdateProfileResponse.description: Success response containing the updated user profile details.

ChangePasswordRequest.description: Payload containing current and new passwords to update user password.

success.description: Indicates if the password change was successful

ChangePasswordResponse.description: Success response wrapper confirming password update.

UpdateNotificationPreferencesRequest.description: Payload containing toggles to update push and email notification settings.

UpdateNotificationPreferencesResponse.description: Success response wrapper confirming notification settings update.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

GetNotificationPreferencesResponse.description: Success response containing user's notification settings.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

message.const: AI botanical diagnosis scan complete.

DiseaseResponse.description: Success response containing diagnosed disease details.

message.const: Plant species classification completed successfully.

PlantClassifyResponse.description: Response payload containing top-N classified plant species predictions and confidence scores.

message.const: Plant disease detection completed successfully.

PlantDiagnoseResponse.description: Response payload containing diagnosed disease categories, confidence scores, and normalized bounding box coords.

totalCount.description: Total number of items in the database

PaginationMeta.description: Standard metadata representing paginated offsets, limits, page indices, and total counts.

GlobalErrorCode.description: Standard enum listing all potential system, auth, validation, and domain error codes.

message.x-apidog-mock: An error occurred while processing the request.

example.message: The request body is malformed or missing required fields.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

data.description: The payload data of the response

Success.description: Standard baseline envelope representing a successful operation wrapper.

MissingImageFieldError.description: Validation error returned when the required image field is missing from the request.

message.const: field required: image

EmptyImageFileError.description: Validation error returned when the uploaded image file has a size of 0 bytes.

message.const: The uploaded image file is empty.

msg.const: file size must be greater than 0 bytes

InvalidParameterTypeError.description: Validation error returned when the image parameter structure does not match a binary file upload.

message.const: Expected a binary file upload for parameter: image

msg.const: value is not a valid file upload structure

InvalidFileTypeError.description: Error returned when the uploaded file is not an allowed image format (e.g. non-image MIME type).

message.const: Uploaded file must be an image.

CorruptedImageError.description: Error returned when the uploaded image is corrupted or cannot be decoded by the backend.

message.const: Unable to decode image. Please check that the file is not corrupted.

PlantAnalyzerInternalServerError.description: Error returned when an unexpected system or model inference exception occurs.

message.const: An unexpected error occurred during model inference.

PlantAnalyzerErrors.description: Unified union schema containing all validation, format, and network errors for the ML inference service.

AuthTokenExpiredError.description: Returned when the access token has expired.

message.const: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
The JWT auth token has expired.

RegisterEmailConflictError.description: Returned if the registration email is taken.

message.const: Registration conflict error.
Email address is already in use by another account.

RegisterUsernameConflictError.description: Returned if the registration username is taken.

message.const: Registration conflict error.
Username is already taken.

RegisterValidationError.description: Returned if signup details violate validation rules.

message.const: Validation failed for register request details.

example.message: Validation failed for register request details.

PlantNotFoundError.description: Returned when the requested plant catalog entry does not exist.

message.const: The requested plant species does not exist in the botanical catalog.
No catalog record matched the provided plant ID.

MyPlantNotFoundError.description: Returned when the user's personal garden plant entry is not found.

message.const: The requested plant entry was not found in your virtual garden.
No personal plant entry matched the provided ID.

ProfileValidationFailedError.description: Returned when profile update parameters fail validation.

message.const: Profile update validation failed.
Must be a valid email address.

PasswordChangeFailedError.description: Returned when password change request is invalid (e.g. current password mismatch).

message.const: Password update failed.
Current password is incorrect.

ValidationError.description: Validation error returned when request body or parameters fail validation.

BadRequestError.description: Returned when the request is malformed or invalid.

message.x-apidog-mock: The request body is malformed or missing required fields.

example.message: The request body is malformed or missing required fields.

UnauthorizedError.description: Returned when authentication is required but not provided.

message.x-apidog-mock: Authentication is required to access this resource.

example.message: Authentication is required to access this resource.

NotFoundError.description: Returned when requested resource does not exist.

message.x-apidog-mock: The requested resource was not found.

example.message: The requested resource was not found.

RateLimitExceededError.description: Returned when client sends too many requests.

message.x-apidog-mock: Too many requests. Please try again later.

example.message: Too many requests. Please try again later.

ConflictError.description: Returned when request conflicts with current state.

message.x-apidog-mock: A conflict occurred with the current state of the resource.

example.message: A conflict occurred with the current state of the resource.

MethodNotAllowedError.description: Returned when HTTP method is not supported.

message.x-apidog-mock: The HTTP method used is not supported by this resource.

example.message: The HTTP method used is not supported by this resource.

InternalServerError.description: Returned when an unexpected error occurs.

message.x-apidog-mock: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

UnsupportedMediaTypeError.description: Returned when Content-Type header is invalid or unsupported.

message.x-apidog-mock: The Content-Type header is invalid or unsupported.

example.message: The Content-Type header is invalid or unsupported.

RegisterConflictError.description: Returned when registration conflicts with existing data.

message.x-apidog-mock: One or more fields conflict with existing records.

RegisterConflictError1.description: Returned when registration conflicts with existing data.

message.const: One or more fields conflict with existing records.

example.message: One or more fields conflict with existing records.
